programme.title: Jaan-E-Mann: Let's Fall in Love... Again
programme.desc: To avoid paying a hefty alimony, Suhaan (Salman Khan) thinks of getting his ex-wife Pia (Preity Zinta) remarried. For that, he convinces Pia¡¯s simpleton college friend Agastya Rao (Akshay Kumar) that he can still marry his college crush. He then helps Agastya to woo Pia, but ends up falling in love with her all over again.

programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.

programme.title: Aarakshan
programme.desc: The controversial policy of caste-based reservations in government jobs and educational institutions in India leads to a conflict between a teacher hailing from a lower class, his good friend belonging to the upper caste, and his mentor.

programme.title: A Night To Regret
programme.desc: When Chelsea meets up with her estranged childhood best friend, Milla, she's unprepared for the events that follow. Milla, who is now a webcam girl briefly catches Chelsea on camera during one of her shows. Unbeknownst to her, Chelsea has now been exposed to a watcher who becomes obsessed and will stop at nothing to have her to himself.

programme.title: A Picture to Remember
programme.desc: Masha is in love with Igor, her college mate, and wants to marry him, but he does not seem in much of a hurry to lead the girl to the altar.

programme.title: A love Inspired Bestseller
programme.desc: In search of a muse to inspire his writing, a successful mystery author falls for a woman who turns out to be more complicated than she first seemed.

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Rail Kings
programme.desc: An irresponsible preppie, Preston West, is presumed to have murdered his parents for a sizeable inheritance, so he flees to find the real killer, Phantom 13, a crazed freight train hobo! Riding speeding boxcars, Preston encounters hostile train yards, vicious railroad cops, hidden hobo jungles, mysterious Lacy, the notorious Baron and his colorful Hobo Gang. In a surprise ending, Preston finally confronts Phantom 13. Based on the controversial Hobo Times books.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Cuba Crossing
programme.desc: Adventurer gets caught up in a plot to kill Fidel Castro.

programme.title: Ten Soldiers of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: This epic actioner features the relentless brave warriors from Genghis Khan's ten soldiers, as they are sent into the woods on a dangerous mission that will put the band of Mongol warriors on the edge of life and death.

programme.title: Kisaan
programme.desc: The story of a farmer, Maan Singh, who struggles to save his ancestral land from corrupt officials and greedy businessmen. With the help of his son, he fights against the system and stands up for his rights as a farmer. The movie highlights the challenges faced by farmers in modern India and explores themes of family, tradition, and social justice in a poignant and inspiring plot.

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: There's been a migration of financial powerbrokers to South Florida in recent years, drawn by various factors. It's hard to imagine the capital of finance leaving New York, but Wall Street South is getting bigger every day.

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Wall Street pros often play poker, chess, blackjack and other games that rely on skills that are highly transferable to their work the lines between finance and gaming are blurring faster than ever.

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Building wealth used to follow a formula, but these days it's easier than ever to play the markets. With investing tools at everyone's fingertips, is it a chance for generational wealth or a siren call for suckers?

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Finance is an industry dominated by men, but women are rising and controlling more wealth globally how did the women of Wall Street break through, and what's changing now that they have?

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Since the 1960s, the price of homeownership has risen twice as fast as inflation what does the future of housing look like and what is Wall Street's role?

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 47
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 50
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 41
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: VIP Pets

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: " Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child' s play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. " Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment. Toys, along with the audience, learn about colors, shapes, objects, come out of difficult situations, learn about friendship and the world in general. The series is simple, kind and funny.

programme.title: Argo' s World

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Most of the year it's encased in ice but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, but the wildlife built to withstand Alaskan winters, often struggle in the summer heat!

programme.title: Race of Life
programme.desc: Animals adapt for survival. Crocodiles, ancient and resilient, boast slow metabolism and efficient physiology. Sharks retain successful traits over time. Whales, from land to sea, evolve with echolocation and robust anatomy, ensuring survival.

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: Wild Ones draws inspiration from the rhythms of nature, delving into the wonders of the animal kingdom. This captivating series explores the diverse behaviors that define survival—hunting and feeding strategies, family bonds, defense tactics, and the intricacies of courtship and mating. programme.title: Tales of Hansik EP4
programme.desc: In the "Juk" episode of Tales of Hansik, we learn about juk, or Korean-style porridge, the first food to be made from grains in Korea. We discover their types, their history, the benefits of juk, and the ways in which juk is served.

programme.title: Tales of Hansik EP6
programme.desc: When Koreans are preparing for a big event or have just completed the feat, they replenish their energy with meat. The most popular types of meat are beef, pork, and chicken, and each has a special place in the Korean cuisine. Beef has always been considered a precious food. Cattle symbolized strength and endurance, and in agricultural societies, they were the most important asset of a family.

programme.title: Arnad town, Aosta Valley, Italy
programme.desc: Arnad town in Aosta Valley is known for the production of the D.O.C Montjovet wine. The small medieval village stands on the banks of the Dora Baltea. It is situated on the banks of the Dora Baltea. Arnad has its roots in tradition: from rock climbing a"&"mong the most famous Alps to the walks in the woods of chestnut or between churches and castles, testimonies of a great past. Nature, sport, history, genuine flavors, relaxation.

programme.title: Voronezh Town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to "&"the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was f"&"inished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: The Good Samaritan Museum, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the road from Jerusalem to the Dead Sea, discover the Good Samaritain Museum, an archaeological and historical site. This museum, which is the only mosaic museum in the country and one of only three in the world, has artefacts which were unearthed in J"&"udea, Samaria and Gaza on display. You are in the area of Ma'ale Adumim (Red Heights), on the same road that pilgrims used to take on their way to Jerusalem, particularly those coming from the Galilee via the Jordan Valley and Jericho, in the footsteps of"&" Jesus and John the Baptist…

programme.title: Pskov City, Russia
programme.desc: Pskov: One of the most beautiful and ancient cities located in the north-west of Russia on the Velikaya River! Only 20 kilometers from the Estonian border, church-studded city Pskov is dominated by its mighty riverside Kremlin: an enormous bulwark that ha"&"s faced up to its fair share of invading armies down the centuries.

programme.title: Carloforte Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Approximately 7 kilometers off the Southwestern Coast of Sardinia, there is an Island with rugged cliffs, no rivers, and a coastline full of beautiful coves. This is San Pietro. Though Erin likes French, frilly, feminine pieces and Ryan prefers furnishings that are sleek, modern and shiny, they rarely disagree about how to decorate and often find a compromise.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out three local favorites where you know who's cooking just by looking at the sign.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits a Raiders home game for tailgating with chefs from three local joints. They're bringing the kitchen to the blacktop and cranking out chicken and waffles, double chili cheeseburgers, steak sandwiches with jalapeno pesto, and smoked pork chops with applesauce.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels to Maine with his longtime cameraman and native Mainer: Zach Zamboni. Along the way, Zach exposes Tony to the food and people of the "two Maines" -- the civilized coastal area and the sparsely populated, untamed, interior region.

programme.title: Q: Alabama's Barbecue Legends
programme.desc: The story of Alabama barbecue can't be told in sentences. It's told through whiffs of smoke, buckets of sauce and friendly nods across the counter. See how a simple dish has become a culinary anthem for Alabama.

programme.title: USA Through Music
programme.desc: American cities have long played a starring role in its music. Notable musicians tell personal stories about how their favorite cities inspire their work.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason loves mountain biking. Tayler prefers to read a book. Jason is up for any adventure tossed at him. Tayler likes to be a bit more prepared. Will the adventures that await in Arkansas leave the couple questioning if they have anything in common?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
